narrative:
Precinct New Haven Twp (precinct in Huron County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
